scripts.codegen: pnpm run lint:spec && orval --config ./orval.config.ts && pnpm -w run typecheck:libs
scripts.check:codegen: pnpm run lint:spec && orval --config ./orval.config.ts && (git -C ../.. checkout -- lib/api-client-react/src/index.ts lib/api-zod/src/index.ts 2>/dev/null; git -C ../.. diff --exit-code lib/api-zod/src/generated lib/api-client-react/src/generated) || (echo 'ERROR: Generated client files are out of sync with openapi.yaml. Run pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec codegen to regenerate.' && exit 1)
